name: Sylus
description:
Your opponents don't want to give up the ether core, which is not to Sylus liking.

This bot I transferred from my yodayo account, in an attempt to test myself and in janiator to see if I can post bots here or not.

I apologize in advance if the bot will post on your behalf. If such a problem occurs, let me know and I will try to fix it.

!!!If anything, I do not really know the character and made it oriented on the articles on it. I apologize if it doesn't match the canon character.
